---
name: Collaboration or coauthorship inquiry
about: Per CONTRIBUTING.md, propose a coauthor collaboration on an extension to the program.
title: "[Collaboration] "
labels: collaboration
---

**Your work**

Brief description of the relevant work you have done or are doing. Links to papers, preprints, or in-progress drafts welcome.

**The extension you propose**

Per CONTRIBUTING.md, eligible extensions are:
- A member #14 of the mono-monostatic catalog, or a member of a related body family
- The analog for a related body family (constant-width Reuleaux solids, non-developable rollers, etc.)
- A substantive new invariant validated against an existing primitive at the precision documented in the methodology paper

Which of these (or what else) does your work address?

**Timeline and scope**

Approximate timeline for the work to reach a draft state. What scope you would prefer for the coauthor paper.

**Coordination notes**

Anything you want to coordinate before deeper work to avoid duplicated effort.
